case_title: DWAYNE MANUEL VS. SPECTRUM PAINTING & DECORATING INC A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANUEL, DWAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT SPECTRUM PAINTING & DECORATING INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT AS TO ASSIGNEE: LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANUEL, DWAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT SPECTRUM PAINTING & DECORATING INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANUEL, DWAYNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPECTRUM PAINTING & DECORATING INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $7,769.79 PRINCIPAL, $40.23 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,990.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
